cannotShareInfo: This share is not available for private or unpublished events
copyInClipboard: Click to copy link to clipboard
deleteInfo: Permanently remove this event from OpenAgenda
removeInfo: The event will no longer be referenced on the agenda
areYouSureToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
cannotChangeStatusInfo: You do not have edition rights over this event
cancelInfo: Your event will remain online, with its title preceded by 'Canceled'.
uncancelInfo: Removes the cancellation mention in the title
requestEditionRightsInfo: This event comes from another agenda. Edition rights are required to change its main fields (ex: title, description, timings...)
publishedInfo: Publish this event to make it visible on the agenda main page
publishedContributorInfo: The event is published and displayed on the agenda
readyForPublishingContributorInfo: The event has been validated by moderators. It will be published without further changes
refusedInfo: This event is not compatible with the agenda and should not be published
refusedContributorInfo: This event is not compatible with the agenda and has been refused by administrators
toCompleteInfo: This event needs to be verified and is not ready for publication
toCompleteContributorInfo: The event will be verified by administrators prior to its publication
readyForPublishingInfo: This event has been verified and is ready to be published
changeFeaturedState: Click here to change the featured state
featuredInfo: The event will appear on top of the agenda's event list
duplicateInfo: Load a new event form pre-filled with the details from this event
requestChangeLocation: Request a change in the location information
couldYouBringFollowingChanges: Hi, could you bring the following changes to the location named '%name%'? reference: %uid% - (add details of the change here)
contributionRestricted: The contribution to this agenda is restricted
markAsScheduled: Clear the status of the event
statusScheduledInfo: The event is not cancelled, nor rescheduled, etc..
statusRescheduledInfo: The timings and dates of the event have been modified
statusMovedOnlineInfo: The event will no longer be attended to at a physical location
statusPostponedInfo: The event dates are no longer valid. New dates are not yet known
statusCancelledInfo: The event has been permanently cancelled
statusFullInfo: New participants are no longer accepted to the event
